gitDiff:
diff --git a/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod b/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod
index 3113b98..04f6210 100644
--- a/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod
+++ b/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod
@@ -205,6 +205,25 @@ Only enable the vector extension:
 
  export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_v"
 
+Enable RISC-V scalar AES crypto extensions for explicit testing or
+benchmarking:
+
+ export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_zknd_zkne"
+
+Enable RISC-V vector AES crypto extensions for explicit testing or
+benchmarking:
+
+ export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_v_zvkb_zvkned"
+
+Enable RISC-V vector AES-GCM crypto extensions for explicit testing or
+benchmarking:
+
+ export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_v_zvkb_zvkg_zvkned"
+
+These AES-specific overrides are intended for diagnostics and benchmarking.
+For normal execution on Linux, applications should prefer the capabilities
+detected by hwprobe.
+
